## Income sources

```{r}
#| label: income sources table

# household df
income_sources_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "income_sources_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# temporary crop df
income_sources_temp_crop_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "income_sources_temp_crop_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# permanent crop df
income_sources_perm_crop_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "income_sources_perm_crop_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# processed crop df
income_sources_processed_crop_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "income_sources_processed_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# livestock df
income_sources_livestock_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "income_sources_anim_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# other animal products df
income_sources_oth_anim_prod_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "oth_anim_prod_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::income_sources(
  hhold_df = income_sources_hhold_df,
  crop_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_crop_var),
  livestock_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_livestock_var),
  temp_crop_df = income_sources_temp_crop_df,
  temp_crop_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_temp_crop_var),
  temp_crop_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_perm_crop_var),
  perm_crop_df = income_sources_perm_crop_df,
  perm_crop_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_perm_crop_var),
  perm_crop_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_perm_crop_val),
  processed_df = income_sources_processed_crop_df,
  processed_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_processed_var),
  processed_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_processed_val),
  anim_df = income_sources_livestock_df,
  sold_live_anim_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_sold_live_anim_var),
  slaughter_anim_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_slaughter_anim_var),
  slaughter_anim_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_slaughter_anim_val),
  sold_live_poultry_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_sold_live_poultry_var),
  slaughter_poultry_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_slaughter_poultry_var),
  slaughter_poultry_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_slaughter_poultry_val),
  milk_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_milk_var),
  milk_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_milk_val),
  eggs_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$income_sources_eggs_var),
  eggs_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$income_sources_eggs_val),
  oth_anim_prod_df = income_sources_oth_anim_prod_df,
  oth_anim_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$oth_anim_var),
  oth_anim_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$oth_anim_val),
  cases = cases_for_report,
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
